title: Mnemosyne album proposal
description: The strict JSON a Mnemosyne album worker emits for Mise's authoritative validator to re-check before a human approves the layout. A proposal must never silently omit, duplicate, or misassign a photo: every placement references an eligible gallery asset, each asset is placed at most once, and each (spread, slot) pair is unique.

placements.description: The ordered layout: which asset sits in which slot of which spread.

asset_id.description: The gallery asset id this slot holds (Mise's asset id space). Must reference a processed/ready photo belonging to this gallery.

slot.description: 0-based slot index within the spread. Each (spread, slot) pair is unique across the proposal.

notes.description: Optional free-text rationale (e.g. why eligible photos were intentionally culled).

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock latency of the proposing call in milliseconds. Reserved for the provenance pass; absent until then.

cost_usd.description: Inference cost of the proposing call in USD (0 for local/free inference, null when unpriced). Reserved for the provenance pass; absent until then.
